campaignevents-desc: Provides features for campaign organisers and participants.
campaignevents-error-invalid-dashboard-u: The provided Dashboard URL is not in the correct format. The URL should be in this format: $1/[Institution Name]/[Programme Title]. For example: $1/Example_Organisation/Example_Event_Title.
campaignevents-error-invalid-question-na: The following questions were not recognised: $1
campaignevents-edit-form-details-subtitl: Provide general information about the event you are organising
campaignevents-edit-form-impact-statisti: Collect statistics on the impact of your events. You can do this by [$1 turning on contribution statistics] and/or adding the [$2 Programmes & Events Dashboard] link.
campaignevents-edit-field-organizers-hel: Add the username of other organisers to give them permission to manage this event.
campaignevents-edit-field-organizers-cre: This is the creator of the event, other organisers can not remove this user.
campaignevents-edit-field-organizers-use: This {{GENDER:$1|user}} is not allowed to organise events.
campaignevents-edit-field-tracking-tools: Enter the Programmes & Events Dashboard URL for your event
campaignevents-edit-organizers-not-allow: $2 {{PLURAL:$1|doesn't|don't}} have the needed permissions to be {{PLURAL:$1|an organiser|organisers}}.
campaignevents-edit-no-organizers: Events need to have at least one organiser. Please add an organiser or delete the event if it is no longer needed.
campaignevents-edit-no-creator: You need to add yourself as an organiser when you first enable event registration.
campaignevents-edit-organizer-need-centr: The following {{PLURAL:$1|user does|users do}} not have a central user account and cannot be added as {{PLURAL:$1|organiser|organisers}}: $2.
campaignevents-event-details-online-link: The link will be made available by the {{PLURAL:$1|organiser|organisers}}.
campaignevents-event-details-venue-not-a: The venue location has not yet been shared by the {{PLURAL:$1|organiser|organisers}}.
campaignevents-event-details-organizers-: You need to enable JavaScript in order to see the full list of organisers.
campaignevents-tracking-tool-wikiedu-not: None of the organiser of this event are facilitators of the course $1.
The course $1 is not connected to this event, and therefore it cannot be synchronised.
campaignevents-registration-confirmation: Private registration: Your username in the participant list can only be seen by the event organisers and members of the following user {{PLURAL:$2|group|groups}}: $1. Your contributions during the event may be excluded by the organisers on the [https://meta.wikimedia.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Programs_%26_Events_Dashboard Programmes & Events Dashboard] or other tools to collect statistics.

Private registration: Your username in the participant list can only be seen by the event organisers. Your contributions during the event may be excluded by the organisers on the [https://meta.wikimedia.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Programs_%26_Events_Dashboard Programmes & Events Dashboard] or other tools to collect statistics.

Public registration: Show your username on a public participant list. Your contributions during the event may be included by the organisers on the [https://meta.wikimedia.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Programs_%26_Events_Dashboard Programs & Events Dashboard] or other tools to collect statistics.
campaignevents-notification-registration: Join the $1 to connect with other participants and get additional updates from the organisers.
The venue location has not yet been shared by the {{PLURAL:$1|organiser|organisers}}.
campaignevents-register-questions-label-: This information will be shared with the event organisers only.
campaignevents-register-question-affilia: Do you belong to any Wikimedia affiliates (chapters, user groups, thematic organisations)? (optional)
Do you belong to any Wikimedia affiliates (chapters, user groups, thematic organisations)?
campaignevents-eventpage-register-dialog: This information will be shared with the event organisers only.
campaignevents-invitation-list-error-not: Enter an event page that lists you as an organiser.
